name: OAuthConsentScreen
description: OAuth consent screen for credential authorization. Service icon, permission scopes, Allow Once/Always Allow/Deny buttons. Used by ggui_request_credential tool when agent needs OAuth access.

visual.description: Centered card on semi-transparent overlay. Service icon with colored ring, permission list with shield icons, three action buttons (primary coral, secondary outline, muted deny link).

props.name: scopes
props.description: OAuth scopes being requested (array of scope ID strings, e.g. ['contacts.read', 'calendar.write'])

props.name: scopeLabels
props.description: Scope ID → human-readable label mapping (Record<string, string>)

props.name: reason
props.description: Why the agent needs this credential

props.name: brandColor
props.description: Service brand color for button theming
